TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR];


INSERT INTO [EDW_FCST].[DIM_HOLIDAY_CALENDAR]

SELECT YEAR(HolidayDate) AS HolidayYear,HolidayDate,HolidayName ,GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM
(
SELECT 'New Years Day' AS HolidayName, '2020-01-01' AS HolidayDate UNION ALL
SELECT 'Day after New Year', '2020-01-02' UNION ALL
